evidence.claim: Shipped RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via learning-to-rank model
Built churn prediction model used by customer success team
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Completed NLP and Deep Learning Specializations
Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Collaborates with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes MLflow, Kubeflow, XGBoost, LightGBM, PyTorch, Elasticsearch, Milvus
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow... Kubeflow... XGBoost and LightGBM... PyTorch... Elasticsearch... Milvus

evidence.claim: Evolved search ranking from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.
